headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Best Buy Co, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: Citigroup  analyst Steven Zaccone   maintains Best Buy Co (NYSE:BBY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $69 to $60.
